title: Digital PCR data for study: Real-time outlier detection in digital PCR data for wastewater-based pathogen surveillance
author: Swiss Federal Institute of Aquatic Science and Technology
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
About 
 This dataset contains the raw wastewater data used in the study "Real-time outlier detection in digital PCR data for wastewater-based pathogen surveillance".  These data are openly shared as part of a multi-pathogen wastewater surveillance program run by the  Swiss Federal Institute of Aquatic Science and Technology (Eawag) . We kindly thank the members of the Wastewater Monitoring Laboratory, including Timothy R. Julian (lead), Lea Caduff, Sheena Conforti, Seju Kang, Jolinda de Korne-Elenbaas, Charles Gan, Rachel McLeod, Melissa Pitton, Linda Schneider, Nadja Widrig, Nadine Hürlimann, and Anna Wettlauffer, for their contributions to the development of digital PCR assays and their application in ongoing wastewater surveillance. We thank the Swiss Federal Office of Public Health FOPH for supporting the wastewater surveillance by Eawag.  Up-to-date data continuously generated by Eawag are publicly available at  https://wisedb.ethz.ch/api/docs/ . 
 Data fields 
     
 
 
 wastewater_treatment_plant.name 
 name of the wastewater treatment plant where the sample was collected from 
 
 
 target 
 pathogen targeted by PCR (IAV-M: influenza A - M gene, IAB-M: influenza B - M gene, RSV-M/N: respiratory syncytial virus - N or M gene, SARS-N1: sars-cov-2 - N1 gene, SARS-N2: sars-cov-2 N2 gene) 
 
 
 date 
 sample collection date 
 
 
 gc_per_lww 
 viral concentration in gene copies per litre of wastewater 
 
 
 total_droplets 
 number of droplets (partitions) from the digital PCR experiment (per partition average) 
 
 
 dilution 
 dilution factor of the raw RNA extract 
 
 
 load 
 viral load in gene copies per person per day 
 
 
 flow 
 flow volume in meters cubed 
 
 
 n_replicates 
 number of technical digital PCR replicates 
 
 
 lod 
 limit of detection for the sample in gene copies per litre of wastewater
